title: Milkbasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Milkbasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
